battle-arena-melbourne-2026.name: Battle Arena Melbourne 2026
battle-arena-melbourne-2026.location: 111 Queens Parade, Fitzroy North VIC 3068, Australia
battle-arena-melbourne-2026.description:
Battle Arena Melbourne 2026 (BAM16) returns as Australia's premier flagship fighting game major. Scheduled from July 10 through July 12, 2026, at the brand-new Bundha Sports Centre, the tournament brings high-stakes competitive action to the Oceania circuit, drawing the region's elite competitors and international stars under one roof.

As the ultimate destination for the ANZ fighting game community, the 2026 edition spotlights a highly anticipated Capcom Pro Tour 2026 Premier Event for Street Fighter 6. Local warriors and traveling global talent will battle through intense open brackets to secure a direct qualification spot for the global finals.

Massive Multi-Game Arena

Beyond the premier Street Fighter 6 tournament, BAM16 boasts an incredible lineup of major international circuit stops and community ladders as part of the CouchWarriors League. The weekend features an official TEKKEN World Tour 2026 Challenger Event for TEKKEN 8, alongside a 2v2 2XKO Challenger Series event offering a $6,000 pot bonus. Additionally, the venue hosts a Virtua Fighter Open Championship World Tour Partner event for Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O., an official SNK World Championship 2026 partner qualifier for both Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves and The King of Fighters XV, and a major bracket for Super Smash Bros. Ultimate.

Registration and Visitor Passes

Competitor registration is tier-structured online, with early bird pricing available until May 30, 2026, regular registration closing on June 27, 2026, and late entry starting June 28, 2026. For fans looking to witness the top-tier competition live, experience the Artist Alley, indie games, and freeplay zones, full weekend Spectator Passes are available online for $25 AUD.

dream-con-championship-series-2026.name: Dream Con Championship Series 2026
dream-con-championship-series-2026.location: 1001 Avenida De Las Americas, Houston, TX 77010, USA
dream-con-championship-series-2026.description:
Dream Con Championship Series 2026 returns as the premier competitive gaming crown jewel of Dream Convention. Scheduled from July 10 through July 12, 2026, at the George R. Brown Convention Center in Houston, Texas, this tournament brings high-stakes competitive action to the southern region, drawing elite competitors and convention attendees under one roof.

As a key stop on the Heartland TKO Circuit 2026, the weekend features highly anticipated open brackets for both Street Fighter 6 and Guilty Gear: Strive. Renowned challengers and regional powerhouses will clash in intense double-elimination brackets to claim circuit points and their share of the prize pool.

Massive Multi-Game Arena and Massive Stakes

Boasting over $13,000 in guaranteed prize pools plus entry fees, the Championship Series spans an impressive array of titles across multiple genres. Headlining the fighting game lineup is a major $5,000 tournament for TEKKEN 8, alongside a $1,500 bracket for 2XKO and $1,000 competitions for Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves. In addition to traditional fighting games, the arena hosts tournaments for Madden 26, NBA 2K26, Rocket League, and the grand finals of the Marvel Rivals circuit.

Registration and Play-to-Earn Badges

Bracket sign-ups are managed online via Start.gg, with registration officially closing on July 8, 2026. All competitors must have a valid Dream Convention 2026 badge to participate. Excitingly, this year introduces the exclusive Play-to-Earn Path, allowing tournament players who purchase a single-day badge to automatically 'earn' their admission for the next day by continuously winning and moving forward within their respective brackets.

igm-summer-showdown-2026.name: IGM Summer Showdown 2026
igm-summer-showdown-2026.location: Dún Laoghaire, Dublin, Co. Dublin, A96 K063, Ireland
igm-summer-showdown-2026.description:
IGM Summer Showdown 2026 arrives as a premier highlight of the European fighting game calendar, hosted live at the luxury 4-star Royal Marine Hotel. Scheduled from July 11 through July 12, 2026, in Dún Laoghaire, Dublin, this major event brings explosive competitive action to the Irish circuit, serving as the second major points qualifier for the prestigious IGM Emerald Circuit 2026 and drawing elite local and international talent under one roof.

As a foundational stop for regional competition, the weekend spotlights a highly anticipated Street Fighter 6 tournament presented by Brook. Competitors will battle through intense open brackets running a strict first-to-three format all the way through, vying for a mix of hardware prizes from Brook and cash payouts driven by registration entries.

Major Circuit Stops and Combined Prize Pools

Boasting up to €4,000 in combined cash prizes, the Summer Showdown features several high-profile global and regional tournament stops. The weekend headlines the 2XKO Northern Europe Community National, giving players a chance to secure massive circuit points and a trip to Battle Coliseum 2026 in Brazil. Additionally, the venue hosts an official 4-Star GBVS World Tour Event for Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising with a fixed prize pool backed by Cygames, alongside major competitive brackets for TEKKEN 8, Guilty Gear Strive, Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes, Invincible VS, and Guilty Gear Xrd REV 2.

Registration and Convention Entry Perks

Bracket sign-ups are managed online via Start.gg, with registration officially closing on July 5, 2026. In an exciting crossover perk, a competitor pass or regular spectator ticket automatically guarantees full access to the main Irish Gaming Market trade hall located just down the corridor, allowing players and fans alike to seamlessly browse creators, artist tables, retro game vendors, and cosplay showcases throughout the weekend.

s-factor-x3.name: S Factor X3
s-factor-x3.location: Centro Expositor Puebla, Av. Ejército de Oriente No. 100, Zona Cívico Cultural 5 de Mayo, 72260 Heroica Puebla de Zaragoza, Pue., México
s-factor-x3.description:
S Factor X3 arrives at the Centro Expositor Puebla as Latin America's premier Super Smash Bros. major. Celebrating twelve years of competition, the massive event draws an estimated 3,000 international competitors and 40,000 attendees to the vibrant city of Puebla. While its roots and main stage are deeply dedicated to the Smash franchise, the gathering serves as a massive destination for the broader fighting game community with a diverse lineup of traditional titles.

Featured Competitions

For fans of traditional fighters, the weekend offers a robust schedule where Street Fighter 6 stands out as a key attraction. The Street Fighter 6 bracket draws top-tier talent looking to test their skills and secure victories within the massive multi-game environment. The traditional fighting game lineup is further bolstered by highly competitive brackets for Tekken 8 and Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves. Additionally, the event features intense showdowns in 2XKO, Guilty Gear -Strive-, and iconic regional favorites like The King of Fighters '98.

Registration and Venue

Competitor passes for the bracket stages running from July 15th through the 19th are available via Start.gg. The main exhibition takes place over the weekend, offering general admission for fans eager to watch the action across all gaming communities. Beyond the tournament setups, the venue hosts expansive zones dedicated to cosplay, content creators, and an artist alley, ensuring an unforgettable experience for everyone in attendance.

esports-world-cup-2026-street-fighter-6-.name: Esports World Cup 2026: Street Fighter 6 - LCQ
esports-world-cup-2026-street-fighter-6-.location: 1 Pl. de la Prte de Versailles, 75015 Paris, France
esports-world-cup-2026-street-fighter-6-.description:
Esports World Cup 2026: Street Fighter 6 - LCQ stands as the ultimate high-stakes gauntlet for fighting game competitors worldwide. Scheduled from July 24 through July 26, 2026, at the iconic Paris Expo Porte de Versailles in Paris, France, this official Last Chance Qualifier serves as the absolute final gateway to the prestigious EWC Main Event, drawing an incredibly hungry pool of international talent looking to salvage their championship dreams.

With a strict registration cap of 512 players on a first-come, first-served basis, the tournament is exclusively reserved for un-qualified contenders, as players who have already secured their positions in the main event are barred from participating. Competitors will face off in an uncompromising open bracket to claim one of the final 6 coveted qualification spots to the historic million-dollar Street Fighter 6 championship arena.

Rigorous Three-Day Tournament Structure

The LCQ is engineered to test the consistency and mental fortitude of every participant over a dense three-day schedule. Day 1 kicks off on Friday, July 24, with mandatory check-ins giving way to a brutal gauntlet of pool play spanning across four separate waves (A through D). Surviving players advance to Day 2 on Saturday, navigating a unforgiving double-elimination landscape through the Top 64, Top 32, and Top 16. The tournament reaches its thrilling climax on Sunday, July 26, with the final Top 8 bracket where the remaining qualifiers are decided under international broadcast spotlights.

Important Competitor and Venue Guidelines

Sign-ups are managed through the official Start.gg portal, with registration conclusively locking on July 19, 2026. In keeping with elite global tournament standards, wireless controllers are strictly prohibited, and all competitors must utilize wired connections or approved tournament-legal converters. Venue entry is entirely free of charge for all registered players, who will receive official badge access upon verifying their identities at the event registration desk.

get-on-my-level-2026-canadian-fighting-g.name: Get On My Level 2026 - Canadian Fighting Game Championships
get-on-my-level-2026-canadian-fighting-g.location: 5875 Airport Rd, Mississauga, ON L4V 1N1, Canada
get-on-my-level-2026-canadian-fighting-g.description:
Get On My Level 2026 returns as Canada's premier fighting game championship. Long recognized as a massive event with deep roots in the Super Smash Bros. community, the tournament brings thousands of competitors and fans to Mississauga, Ontario. While its legacy is heavily tied to the Smash franchise, the gathering has expanded to become a major competitive destination for the broader fighting game community with a diverse lineup of traditional titles.

Featured Competitions

For fans of traditional fighters, the weekend offers a robust schedule where Street Fighter 6 takes a prominent spot on the lineup. The Street Fighter 6 bracket draws a fierce pool of talent looking to test their skills and claim victory within the electric multi-game atmosphere. The traditional fighting game roster is further bolstered by highly competitive brackets for Tekken 8, Guilty Gear -Strive-, Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising, and Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes.

Registration and Venue

Competitor passes for the event are available via Start.gg, with multiple registration phases leading up to the July 24th deadline. The main exhibition takes place over the weekend at the Hilton Airport Hotel, offering spectator passes for fans eager to watch the action across all gaming communities. Beyond the primary tournaments, the event features team formats, crew battles, and an opportunity to connect with the passionate Canadian esports scene.
